description:
You are acting as an on–call incident responder who was paged because an
    internal TLS certificate might be expiring soon.  
    A text snapshot that was taken from the front-end proxy is already present on
    the system:

      /home/user/certs/server_info.txt

    Its exact current contents are:

        Subject: CN=www.acme-inc.internal
        Not Before: Jun 15 00:00:00 2023 GMT
        Not After : Jun 15 23:59:59 2025 GMT
        Serial    : 65A9C3

    Management needs the key certificate fields (Common Name, Not-Before, and
    Not-After) extracted and logged in a strict, machine-readable format so that
    a monitoring job can ingest it later.

    Your task:

    1. Read /home/user/certs/server_info.txt.  
    2. Convert the two date values to ISO-8601 UTC form
          – “Jun 15 00:00:00 2023 GMT”  ➜  2023-06-15T00:00:00Z  
          – “Jun 15 23:59:59 2025 GMT”  ➜  2025-06-15T23:59:59Z
    3. Create a new directory called /home/user/ir_logs (if it does not
       already exist) with default user permissions.
    4. Inside that directory create the file

          /home/user/ir_logs/cert_analysis.log

       and write a single line in the **exact** format shown below
       (pipe-separated, no leading or trailing spaces):

          www.acme-inc.internal|2023-06-15T00:00:00Z|2025-06-15T23:59:59Z

       A final newline (LF) must follow the line.
    5. Display the file to the console so the SOC lead sees the result.

    The automated test will check *only* that
    /home/user/ir_logs/cert_analysis.log exists and that its entire contents are
    byte-for-byte identical to the single line (plus newline) shown above.
truth:
<!-- Pre-existing artefacts on the filesystem -->
    <initial_files>
        <file path="/home/user/certs/server_info.txt"><![CDATA[
Subject: CN=www.acme-inc.internal
Not Before: Jun 15 00:00:00 2023 GMT
Not After : Jun 15 23:59:59 2025 GMT
Serial    : 65A9C3
]]></file>
    </initial_files>

    <!-- Desired end-state used by the grader -->
    <expected_files>
        <file path="/home/user/ir_logs/cert_analysis.log" mode="0644"><![CDATA[
www.acme-inc.internal|2023-06-15T00:00:00Z|2025-06-15T23:59:59Z
]]></file>
    </expected_files>
name: task_000000_388e6d59
